name: Beghelli S.p.A.
summary: Beghelli S.p.A. manufactures and sells various energy saving lighting products, electronic systems for domestic and industrial safety, and components for the photovoltaic power production in Italy and other European countries. It offers emergency luminaires, exit signs, LED modules with inverters, inverters, ceiling suspended systems, downlights, indoor and outdoor louvres, industrial and street lightings, projectors, floodlights, row systems, reglettes, and portable lights, as well as anti black-out and LED lamps; and building automation emergency, recessed and ceiling, and wall and ceiling products. The company also provides drinking water treatment, portable lights, batteries, and S.O.S. products. In addition, it offers helpline, after-sale, and case study services. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Monteveglio, Italy.
